scope: Curated executive video/interview transcript sources for PDD/Pinduoduo/Temu leadership and business-model evidence.

audit_policy.important_claim_rule: Important business-model or leadership claims from videos/interviews require cross-checking against filings, financial outcomes, customer evidence, and merchant evidence.
audit_policy.financial_number_rule: Do not use video/interview transcripts for official financial numbers.
audit_policy.failure_rule: If captions/subtitles are unavailable or blocked, record the failed/partial collection state and do not synthesize a transcript.
audit_policy.business_model_question_rule: Run the shared business-model question pack only over collected subtitles/transcripts, permitted ASR output, user-provided transcripts, or a clearly labeled platform analysis adapter.

sources.name: 人民网专访拼多多创始人黄峥
notes: Public Bilibili video target discovered during PDD executive-material source search.
Treat as lower-tier executive/context evidence until original source provenance and transcript quality are reviewed.

sources.name: Manual Bilibili transcript export intake
sources.manual_transcript_source: Bilibili subtitle export, BibiGPT export, or permitted ASR transcript
notes: Use this when a Bilibili video has no exposed subtitle track but the user provides a transcript export or permitted ASR output.
The agent will not fetch or synthesize video content from this row unless local_transcript_path points to a real transcript file.

sources.name: 人民网 / 环球网：黄峥谈社交电商与拼多多模式
notes: Public People/Huanqiu text page for Huang Zheng's People interview context; use as controlled fallback when the related Bilibili page exposes no subtitle track.
Do not label this as a Bilibili transcript. It is web interview text linked to the same executive-material research target.

sources.name: 中国企业家 / 新浪财经：黄峥上市前访谈
notes: Public media interview page; use for executive framing, not official financial numbers.
Source provenance should be reviewed before upgrading confidence.

sources.name: 央视财经 / 新浪科技：黄峥谈平台治理和品质升级
notes: Public media interview page focused on consumer orientation, counterfeit/brand issues, and supply-chain quality.
Treat as management-context evidence and cross-check against risk factors and customer evidence.

sources.name: Podwise：财约你专访黄峥《拼多多的未来》摘要页
notes: This page references a YouTube episode and exposes a public summary/outline, but full transcript access may require sign-in.
Use only as a lead to locate the underlying video/transcript, not as strong evidence.

sources.name: Manual YouTube executive interview URL intake
sources.search_locator: YouTube PDD Pinduoduo Colin Huang Chen Lei interview business model
notes: The code supports YouTube caption tracks once a real URL is added to this registry.
Do not add guessed video URLs; use only verified target pages.
